title: Introducing GPT-5.3-Codex
description: OpenAI launched GPT-5.3-Codex, its most capable agentic coding model yet. The release combined the Codex and GPT-5 training stacks to improve code generation, reasoning, and steerable long-running coding workflows.
highlights: Combined Codex and GPT-5 training stacks
A step toward general-purpose coding agents
